name: Loan Application
process_description: The loan application process begins when a customer submits a loan request in the online portal. A loan officer reviews the application and requests missing documents if needed. The credit assessment team performs a credit check. The risk department evaluates the applicant profile. A senior manager approves or rejects the application. If approved, the disbursement team releases the funds and notifies the customer.
simulation_goal: Improve loan officer utilization while reducing customer waiting time between application review and final decision
